contract_items.label: single_tag_filter
contract_items.description: Handle ?tags=<value> case-insensitively and return metadata.appliedTags with normalized lowercase tags.
contract_items.expected_behavior: Handle ?tags=<value> case-insensitively and return metadata.appliedTags with normalized lowercase tags.
test_refs: SRM problem tag filters::filters by a single tag case-insensitively

contract_items.label: multi_tag_union
contract_items.description: Comma-separated tags (e.g. ?tags=foo,bar) must match problems that contain any requested tag and expose both normalized tags in metadata.appliedTags.
contract_items.expected_behavior: Comma-separated tags (e.g. ?tags=foo,bar) must match problems that contain any requested tag and expose both normalized tags in metadata.appliedTags.
test_refs: SRM problem tag filters::accepts comma-separated tags and returns merged results

contract_items.label: array_tag_filter
contract_items.description: tags[]=... array form must work alongside difficulty filters while preserving ordering by roundId and the paging limit.
contract_items.expected_behavior: tags[]=... array form must work alongside difficulty filters while preserving ordering by roundId and the paging limit.
test_refs: SRM problem tag filters::accepts array form and combines with difficulty filter

clauses: Handle ?tags=<value> case-insensitively and return metadata.appliedTags with normalized lowercase tags.

tags[]=... array form must work alongside difficulty filters while preserving ordering by roundId and the paging limit.
